name: Low Cal Whipped Topping
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry sugar substitute (equal to 1/4 cup sugar), optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the instant dry milk and cold water in a bowl, stirring until well combined. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Beat the mixture at high speed with an electric mixer for 4 minutes until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually add lemon juice to the whipped mixture while continuing to beat at high speed for another 4 minutes.
4. Add sugar and sugar substitute (if using) to the whipped topping, mixing until well incorporated.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Refrigerate the whipped topping until ready to serve. It yields 24 servings of approximately 2 tablespoons each.
7. Serve as close to serving time as possible, as the volume decreases over time.
Nutritive value per serving (2 tbsp): CAL 12; CHO 2 gm; PRO Negl; FAT Negl NA 6 mg
Food exchanges: 1/3 cup may be considered a vegetable exchange.
